# Data Act

Jurisdiction: European Union / EEA
Region: EU
Citation: Regulation (EU) 2023/2854
Authority: European Union
Source URL: https://eur-lex.europa.eu/legal-content/EN/TXT/?uri=CELEX:32023R2854
Topics: notice_transparency, third_party_sharing, processor_contracts, cross_border_transfer, accountability
Keywords: Data Act, connected products, IoT data, data holder, data recipient, cloud switching, unfair contract terms, 数据访问, 数据共享

## Summary
EU rules on access to and use of data generated by connected products and related services, business-to-business data sharing, cloud switching, and public-sector access in exceptional need.

## Key compliance obligations
- Design connected products and related services to make generated data accessible where required.
- Provide pre-contractual information on data generation and access.
- Handle third-party data access and public-sector requests under the Act's conditions.
